All the above five planets are on one Dh.
side of Rahu-Ketu axis. The elders of
the family went abroad and amassed
Mars
money.
Venus strong in his own place and Mercury in 12th to it, indicates that
the father of the native may have had a mistress besides his legal wife.
The Sun conjunct Venus indicates his wife coming from the same place
where the native was born.
The native will take up agriculture, chanting of Mantras and also
trading as means of livelihood. Saturn contacts Ketu (Mantra), Mars (agri
culture) and later Mercury (Trade).
When Jupiter after crossing Mars contacts Rahu, the native will suffer
ill-health through boils, accidents while travelling and extra heat in the
system. Propitiation of Rahu and Mars will help him to overcome the ob
stacles.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 193
